name: Carrots in Orange-Basil Butter
recipeIngredient: Pinch Dried Basil, Crushed or Snipped Parsley (Optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut carrots into julienne strips.
2. Place carrot strips in a 1-quart casserole dish. Sprinkle with water.
3. Cook covered on high power for 2 to 3 minutes, or until the carrot strips are crisp-tender. Allow to cool, then cover.
4. For the butter mixture, combine butter (or margarine), orange peel, and basil in a microwavable cup. Cook uncovered on high power for about 30 seconds, or until melted.
5. Drain carrots. Drizzle butter mixture over carrot strips.
6. Garnish with snipped parsley, if desired.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 Vegetable Exchange + 1 Fat Exchange
